item.description:
What's New

  • add `--xip-url` alias for `--ipsw-url` scan flag
  • add Xcode support and restructure with product sections
  • add Xcode 12 release data (23 builds)
  • add Xcode 13 release data (17 builds)
  • add Xcode 14 release data (11 builds)
  • add Xcode 15 release data (22 builds)
  • add Xcode 16 release data (21 builds)
  • add Xcode 26 release data (26 builds)

Fixes

  • filter DriverKit SDKs from macOS SDK discovery
  • fix Xcode clang version extraction and Swift fallback path
  • improve accessibility and add security meta tags
  • remove duplicate search landmark from wrapper div
  • truncate Swift `swiftlang-` versions to release version

Under the Hood

  • add `sudo`, fix Python regex, remove `libedit`
  • omit empty `kernels` from `Release` JSON encoding
  • align Xcode scanner output with macOS parity
  • extend `validate` command to support `.xip` archives
